scripts.test: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run -- nx run-many -t test
scripts.test:api:integration: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run -- pnpm exec nx run api:integration-api
scripts.test:llm:enduser: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run -c stg -- pnpm exec tsx scripts/enduser-session-pass.ts
scripts.test:llm:book-generation: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run -c stg -- pnpm exec tsx scripts/book-generation-pass.ts
scripts.test:llm:source-grounding: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run --project mentomate --config stg -- pnpm eval:llm -- --live --flow probes --scenarios source-grounding --max-live-calls 12
scripts.test:llm:personalization-matrix: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run --project mentomate --config stg -- pnpm eval:llm -- --live --flow probes --scenarios personalization --max-live-calls 16
scripts.test:llm:premium-routing: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run -c stg -- pnpm exec tsx scripts/premium-routing-pass.ts
scripts.test:llm:homework-source: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run --project mentomate --config stg -- pnpm eval:llm -- --live --flow probes --scenarios homework-source --max-live-calls 8
scripts.test:llm:post-session-artifacts: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run --project mentomate --config stg -- pnpm eval:llm -- --live --flow session-summary --flow session-recap --flow session-analysis --flow progress-summary --flow assessment-evaluation --max-live-calls 45
scripts.test:llm:artifact-personalization: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run --project mentomate --config stg -- pnpm exec tsx scripts/artifact-personalization-pass.ts
scripts.test:llm:book-suggestions: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run --project mentomate --config stg -- pnpm eval:llm -- --live --flow book-suggestion-regeneration --scenarios book-suggestions --max-live-calls 25
scripts.db:push:dev: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run -c dev -- pnpm --filter @eduagent/database run db:push
scripts.db:check-identity-fks:dev: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run -c dev -- pnpm db:check-identity-fks
scripts.db:generate:dev: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run -- pnpm --filter @eduagent/database exec tsx node_modules/drizzle-kit/bin.cjs generate
scripts.db:migrate:dev: node -e "console.error('db:migrate:dev is disabled: dev Neon is push/direct-only (WI-649). Use db:push:dev instead.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.db:studio:dev: node scripts/doppler-run.mjs run -- pnpm --filter @eduagent/database exec tsx node_modules/drizzle-kit/bin.cjs studio
scripts.pretest:e2e:
node -e "if (process.env.SKIP_E2E_GUARD) { process.exit(0); } console.error('
❌ pnpm test:e2e is broken: bare maestro resolves via PATH to a Unicode-broken install.
Use C:/Tools/maestro/bin/maestro.bat directly. See docs/E2Edocs/e2e-runbook.md
Set SKIP_E2E_GUARD=1 in CI to bypass this guard.
'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.pretest:e2e:smoke:
node -e "if (process.env.SKIP_E2E_GUARD) { process.exit(0); } console.error('
❌ pnpm test:e2e:smoke is broken: bare maestro resolves via PATH to a Unicode-broken install.
Use C:/Tools/maestro/bin/maestro.bat directly. See docs/E2Edocs/e2e-runbook.md
Set SKIP_E2E_GUARD=1 in CI to bypass this guard.
'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.pretest:e2e:record:
node -e "if (process.env.SKIP_E2E_GUARD) { process.exit(0); } console.error('
❌ pnpm test:e2e:record is broken: bare maestro resolves via PATH to a Unicode-broken install.
Use C:/Tools/maestro/bin/maestro.bat directly. See docs/E2Edocs/e2e-runbook.md
Set SKIP_E2E_GUARD=1 in CI to bypass this guard.
'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.translate: doppler run -- pnpm exec tsx scripts/translate-gemini.ts
